core_payload.content:
# Capsule Markup Agent

## 1. Role
Capsule Markup Agent will keep the vault highly legible to humans and agents as scale increases. Structural validity will not be enough; metadata, summaries, keywords, naming, and taxonomy will also need continuous maintenance as explicit semantic surfaces.

## 2. Future Annotation Surface
- clearer automatic enrichment of metadata, summaries, and keyword layers
- tighter taxonomy consistency across types, subtypes, tiers, and naming conventions
- stronger support for Librarian, retrieval, and graph-grounded assistant answers
- safer repair of semantically weak capsules without inventing new truth claims

## 3. Operational Consequence
The vault will remain readable, retrievable, and cognitively efficient because semantic clarity will be treated as a first-class maintenance lane rather than as optional polish.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Capsule Markup Agent supports To Dig Deep by making depth legible.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Markup Agent defines the future stronger semantic-annotation lane for N1Hub: richer metadata enrichment, tighter taxonomy discipline, better support for retrieval and assistant grounding, and safer repair of semantically weak capsules at scale.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
